How financing works

Step 1

Apply

Two-minute application from your dashboard, no paperwork.

Step 2

Review

We review your profile and give you a decision, usually within 24 hours.

Step 3

Approve

Accept your terms — clear rate, clear schedule, no surprises.

Step 4

Fund

Funds land in your account, often the same day you're approved.

Check your rate without affecting your credit score.
